originalTitle: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
summary: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
content: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
chineseTitle: 立陶宛领导人在无人机空中警报期间避难
chineseSummary: 在白俄罗斯边境附近发现疑似无人机后，航班暂停，并敦促人们避难。
chineseContent: 在白俄罗斯边境附近发现疑似无人机后，航班暂停，并敦促人们避难。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
